summary: Comprehensive testing of location-based access control feature for AestheticaMD. All 17 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing confirms location badges, checkboxes, and filtered views work correctly.

design_issues.issue: Console shows hydration warnings for <span> inside <tbody>/<select>/<option>. This is a development tooling artifact, not affecting functionality.

backend_api: POST /api/auth/login - Non-admin login returns location_ids and global_access
GET /api/patients - Non-admin sees only their location + unassigned patients
GET /api/surgery-slots/calendar-data - Non-admin sees only their location's slots
frontend_ui: Users Page: Admin shows 'Wszystkie' badge with globe icon
Users Page: Non-admin (Jan Kowalski) shows 'MED' badge for Medicus location
Add User Modal: Location checkboxes for Pro-Familia and Medicus present
Add User Modal: 'Dostęp globalny' checkbox present
Edit User Modal: Location checkboxes present
Edit User Modal: 'Dostęp globalny' checkbox present
Non-admin: Users link hidden in sidebar
Non-admin Dashboard: Shows filtered upcoming surgeries (1 vs 9 for admin)
Non-admin Calendar: Shows only MED slots, no PRO slots
Non-admin Controls: Shows 3 filtered patients with controls

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings in console for table/select elements - cosmetic issue from development tooling, not affecting functionality
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test user Jan Kowalski with Medicus location assignment.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Location-based access control feature fully tested and working. Admin sees all data, non-admin users see only data from their assigned locations + unassigned patients. Users page shows location badges (MED, PRO) or 'Wszystkie' for global access. Edit/Add user modals have location checkboxes and global access toggle. Location IDs: Pro-Familia=05d9b792-07f3-43f4-ace2-89d4ec9cc57d, Medicus=589030c5-d58e-4ef7-a262-cd2b672bb4c8.
